author: maintainer-agent

patch.value: Add TruffleHog OSS verified-secret scanning to the security workflow and complete free GitHub secret-scanning toggles

TruffleHog OSS job (SHA-pinned release) green in the Security and Script Quality workflow on push/PR with verified+unknown results failing the job; GitHub secret_scanning_non_provider_patterns and secret_scanning_validity_checks enabled via API (both free on public repos); no secrets found on the initial full scan

message: Maintainer directive 2026-07-14: fully set up trufflehog-oss using only free features. Repo already has secret_scanning + push_protection + Dependabot security updates + private vulnerability reporting enabled; the two remaining free toggles (non-provider patterns, validity checks) get enabled alongside. TruffleHog adds live-credential verification on top of Trivy's pattern-based secret scan — complements, does not replace. Related pm-pim7 (pm-side secret guard for item text) — this covers the repo/CI side.

value.author: maintainer-agent
value.text: GitHub toggle attempt 2026-07-14: PATCH /repos with security_and_analysis.secret_scanning_non_provider_patterns/.secret_scanning_validity_checks = enabled returns 200 but the values stay 'disabled' (verified via GET after retry with JSON body and form syntax) — silently ignored for this user-namespace public repo; these two appear UI-gated. Maintainer UI path: Settings → Advanced Security → Secret Protection → enable 'Non-provider patterns' and 'Validity checks' (both FREE on public repos). Already-enabled free surface verified live: secret_scanning, secret_scanning_push_protection, dependabot_security_updates, private vulnerability reporting.

author: maintainer-agent

patch.value: TruffleHog OSS job (SHA-pinned release) green in the Security and Script Quality workflow on push/PR with verified+unknown results failing the job; no secrets found on the initial scan; GitHub secret_scanning_non_provider_patterns and secret_scanning_validity_checks either enabled or (API-gated, verified 2026-07-14) documented with exact free UI steps for the maintainer

message: AC adjusted: the two GH toggles are UI-gated (API PATCH silently ignored); steps documented in comments.

value.author: maintainer-agent
value.text: Implementation: TruffleHog job added to security.yml — trufflesecurity/trufflehog@27b0417c (v3.95.9), fetch-depth:0, extra_args '--results=verified,unknown --exclude-paths=.trufflehog-exclude-paths.txt'. Local full-history scan with the pinned binary: 0 verified secrets; sole 'unknown' = deliberate test fixture https://user:pass@example.test in tests/unit/health-command.spec.ts (DNS-unverifiable) — excluded via unanchored path regex (anchored ^...$ does NOT match in git mode; trap noted). Post-exclusion scan exit 0 / 0 findings printed.
